explicit_text: I first came to the United States in 1998 with my mother to visit my father, who was studying music. Our family eventually immigrated here permanently when my father received a chance to pursue a doctorate in Minnesota. The U.S. became the place where my family sought new opportunities and where I grew up surrounded by a diverse immigrant community.
implicit_text: I first came to this country in 1998 with my mother to visit my father, who was studying music. Our family eventually immigrated here permanently when my father received a chance to pursue a doctorate in Minnesota. This nation became the place where my family sought new opportunities and where I grew up surrounded by a diverse immigrant community.

explicit_text: I was born in Sofia, Bulgaria, where my family lived before moving to the United States. My mother worked as a tour guide at the National History Museum in Bulgaria before pursuing further education abroad. Leaving Bulgaria was difficult because we had to abandon a steady life, but the opportunities in the U.S. for my father's music career were too important to pass up.
implicit_text: I was born in Sofia, the capital of a Balkan country, where my family lived before moving to the United States. My mother worked as a tour guide at the National History Museum there before pursuing further education abroad. Leaving that country was difficult because we had to abandon a steady life, but the opportunities in the U.S. for my father's music career were too important to pass up.

explicit_text: My father studied at the Kansas City Conservatory of Music on an F1 Student Visa, pursuing a master's degree in cello performance. This was the first step in his journey to advance his music career outside Bulgaria. It was during this time that my mother and I visited him in Missouri before our family moved to Minnesota.
implicit_text: My father studied at a well-known conservatory in Kansas City on an F1 Student Visa, pursuing a master's degree in cello performance. This was the first step in his journey to advance his music career outside Bulgaria. It was during this time that my mother and I visited him in Missouri before our family moved to Minnesota.

explicit_text: Our family moved to Minnesota after my father was offered a free doctorate opportunity in cello performance at the University of Minnesota. We lived in graduate student housing there, surrounded by many other immigrant families. Minnesota became our new home where both my parents pursued higher education and where I grew up immersed in a multicultural environment.
implicit_text: Our family moved to a northern Midwestern state after my father was offered a free doctorate opportunity in cello performance at a major public university there. We lived in graduate student housing, surrounded by many other immigrant families. That state became our new home where both my parents pursued higher education and where I grew up immersed in a multicultural environment.

explicit_text: The University of Minnesota played a central role in our family's life after we moved here. My father pursued his doctorate in cello performance under a professor who recognized his talent, and my mother completed her master's degree in history by transferring her credits from Bulgaria. We lived in university housing, which connected us with a diverse community of immigrant families.
implicit_text: The large public university in Minnesota played a central role in our family's life after we moved here. My father pursued his doctorate in cello performance under a professor who recognized his talent, and my mother completed her master's degree in history by transferring her credits from Bulgaria. We lived in university housing, which connected us with a diverse community of immigrant families.

explicit_text: Before we left Bulgaria, my mother worked as a tour guide at the National History Museum in Sofia. She had a stable career there, which made the decision to move to the U.S. even more courageous. Her background in history inspired her to finish her master's degree at the University of Minnesota after we immigrated.
